query:
SELECT `id`, `poNumber`, `vendorName`, `createdAt`
FROM `import_batch_backups`
WHERE JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025209') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025225') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025228') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025229') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025239') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025240') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025241') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025247') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025252') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025253') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025256') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025264') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025266') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025269') IS NOT NULL
   OR JSON_SEARCH(CAST(`snapshot` AS CHAR), 'one', '00500025271') IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY `createdAt` DESC;
